title: Service-Oriented Architecture with RESTful APIs
scenario: Design a service-oriented architecture for a banking system with multiple services (customer, account, transaction). The target LLM output should be a high-level architecture diagram in Markdown format. The architecture should include RESTful APIs, message queues, and service registration.
constraints: Must use UML notation for the architecture diagram
Must include at least 5 services and 10 APIs

evaluationCriteria.description: The generated architecture diagram should accurately represent the service-oriented architecture.
The architecture should include a service registration mechanism for dynamic discovery.
The generated Markdown diagram should be syntactically correct and formatted correctly.
